model.signup.step2_desc: Nummeret ditt vil kun bli brukt til sikkerhetsvalidering.

model.signup.success_desc_line4: Du vil motta en e-post så snart kontoen din er aktivert.

age.title: Dette er et nettsted for voksne
age.desc: Ved å gå inn bekrefter du at du er minst 18 år gammel eller i myndighetsalder i jurisdiksjonen du besøker nettstedet fra, og du samtykker i å se seksuelt eksplisitt innhold.

footer.disclaimer: Eierne og operatørene av dette nettstedet er ikke den primære produsenten (slik begrepet er definert i 18 USC seksjon 2257) av noe av det visuelle innholdet på nettstedet. Originale dokumenter som kreves i henhold til 18 U.S.C. seksjon 2257 og 28 C.F.R. 75 for materiale på nettstedet oppbevares av den aktuelle Custodian of Records som følger: MV CAPITAL, 50 avenue des Champs-Elysées, 75008 Paris, Frankrike
slavery.title: Erklæring mot moderne slaveri
slavery.content: Kinky tar avstand fra alle former for moderne slaveri og menneskehandel, sexhandel eller misbruk. Moderne slaveri er en forbrytelse og et brudd på grunnleggende menneskerettigheter. Det tar ulike former som slaveri, trelldom, tvangsarbeid og menneskehandel, som alle har til felles berøvelse av en persons frihet av en annen person for å utnytte dem til personlig eller kommersiell vinning. Vi forplikter oss til å opptre med integritet og redusere risikoen for moderne slaveri og menneskehandel i våre forretningsforbindelser og relasjoner med våre skapere og brukere. Vi forplikter oss also til å behandle alle ansatte, partnere og leverandører med respekt og verdighet, sikre trygge arbeidsforhåll og drive miljømessig ansvarlig og etisk virksomhet.
legal.title: Personvernerklæring
legal.intro: At Kinky, protecting your privacy is our top priority. This Privacy Policy describes the policies and procedures on the collection, use, and disclosure of your information when you use our services. We comply with all relevant protection standards, including GDPR for Europe, CCPA for the United States, and LGPD for Brazil. Our commitment is to provide a premium and safe environment for our users.
legal.controller_content:
MV CAPITAL
50 avenue des champs Elysées
75008 Paris - Frankrike
Kontakt: support@kinky.live
legal.data_types_content:
We collect various types of Personal Data to provide and improve our service:
- Identifiers: Online identifier, Internet Protocol address, unique device identifiers.
- Usage Data: Information regarding how the site is accessed and used (e.g. browser type, version, time spent on pages, and navigation paths).
- Hardware Permissions: Your device's camera and microphone permissions are only requested and used when starting a live match.
- Account Data: Username, email address, and encrypted credentials.
legal.processing_content:
We work with trusted third-party providers to deliver our core services. Your data may be processed by the following entities:
- Secure Cloud Infrastructure: High-availability servers for hosting the backend and application logic.
- Redis (ioRedis): High-performance memory-based storage used for real-time user matching and session management.
- Twilio: Provides Secure Infrastructure (STUN/TURN) for establishing peer-to-peer WebRTC connections.
- Socket.io: Enables real-time signaling for video chat synchronization and internal messaging.
- WebRTC Technology: Facilitates direct peer-to-peer audio and video communication without storing media on our servers.
legal.rights_eu_title: 4. Ytterligere informasjon for brukere i Den europeiske union (GDPR)
legal.rights_eu_content:
Under the GDPR, European Union users possess the following rights:
- Right to Access: Request copies of your processed data.
- Right to Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information.
- Right to Erasure: Request the deletion of your data under certain conditions.
- Right to Object: Challenge processing based on legitimate interests or direct marketing.
- Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
legal.rights_us_title: 5. Ytterligere informatie for brukere i USA
legal.rights_us_content:
US residents (including CA, VA, CO, CT, TX, OR) are provided with specific rights at collection:
- Notice at Collection: We disclose the categories of information collected (Identifiers, Commercial Info, Geolocation, Internet Activity).
- Right to Access and Data Portability: You can request details of the data we hold.
- Right to Delete and Correct: You can request the removal or correction of your information.
- Right to Opt-Out: We do not 'sell' your info, but you have the right to opt-out of sharing for targeted advertising.
- Right to Limit Use of Sensitive Info: Restricting the processing of credentials to what is necessary.
legal.rights_br_title: 6. Ytterligere informasjon for brukere i Brasil (LGPD)
legal.rights_br_content: Brasilianske brukere har rett til å få bekreftet at databehandling forekommer, få tilgang til sine data og korrigere ufullstendig eller unøyaktig informasjon.
legal.definitions_content:
- Personal Data: Any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
- Usage Data: Data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself.
- Data Subject: The natural person using our Service to whom the data belongs.
- Data Controller: MV CAPITAL, the entity that determines the purposes and means of the processing of Personal Data.
- Tracker: Any technology (e.g. Cookies, web beacons) that enables the tracking of users.
terms.title: General Terms and Conditions
terms.purpose_content: Kinky (the "Website") is a premium live video chat application providing instant text, audio, and video messaging services. These terms define the relationship between the Manager and the Users.
terms.manager_content: The Website is managed by MV CAPITAL, a French company located at 50 avenue des champs Elysées, 75008 Paris. Contact: support@kinky.live
terms.access_content: Users must be at least eighteen (18) years old. The service is for private individuals only and not for professional or commercial use.
terms.acceptance_content: By clicking "Enter" or using the Services, you accept these terms in full. Any qualified acceptance is considered null and void.
terms.payments_content: All transactions are handled by secure, PCI-DSS compliant third-party payment processors. Users contract directly with these processors for payment implementation.
terms.services_content: Kinky provides real-time communication via WebRTC technology. We use Twilio for secure connection establishment and Socket.io for instant signaling and messaging. Users are responsible for having functional hardware (camera, microphone).
terms.financials_content: Users purchase Credits to use the Services. Credits are valid for 365 days from purchase and are strictly non-refundable.
terms.obligations_content: Users must respect all laws, be polite, and avoid any illegal content, including prostitution or pimping. Users are solely responsible for their interactions.
terms.moderation_content: We use automatic and manual moderation to monitor compliance. Breaches result in immediate account suspension or deletion without refund.
terms.withdrawal_content: Services are provided immediately upon registration. Consequently, Users expressly waive their 14-day right of withdrawal.
terms.jurisdiction_content: These terms are governed by French law. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts of Paris.
